Uses of Interface
org.jscience.core.mathematics.geometry.volume.VoxelModel

Packages that use VoxelModel
Package
Description
org.jscience.core.mathematics.geometry.volume
Comprehensive mathematical structures, including algebra, calculus, and numerical analysis.
org.jscience.natural.earth.geology
Core functionality for the org.jscience.natural.earth.geology package in the JScience library.
org.jscience.natural.medicine.anatomy
Core functionality for the org.jscience.natural.medicine.anatomy package in the JScience library.
org.jscience.natural.ui.viewers.shared.volume
User interface components and internationalization support for JScience applications.

    A VoxelModel that generates data procedurally using 'Real' math.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    GoldAssayVoxelModel
    A VoxelModel simulating a mineral deposit (e.g., Gold Assay) for Geoscience visualization.
